summary: The implementation successfully addresses all requirements. The diff shows a complete comment system with backend Comment type, API endpoints (addComment, getCaseComments), frontend hooks (useAddComment, useGetCaseComments), ActivitySection integration with Add Comment button and History toggle, ActivityTimeline component with light color-coded blocks and scrolling, and comprehensive visual specifications documented in JSDoc comments. All acceptance criteria are met with proper backend integration, timeline updates, color coding, scrolling behavior, and detailed specifications.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration system added for backend state upgrade (backend/migration.mo)
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention creating a migration module or implementing state upgrade logic. The constraint specifies maintaining the existing backend Activity type, but this adds a new migration layer not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notifications for comment submission feedback
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff shows toast.success() and toast.error() calls in ActivitySection.tsx, but the BuildRequest does not mention implementing toast notifications or user feedback messages beyond the UI updates.

hallucinated_features.description: Author display logic with 'You' vs shortened principal names
hallucinated_features.reason: ActivityTimeline.tsx includes getAuthorName() function that displays 'You' for current user and truncated principal IDs for others. This level of author identification was not specified in requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode color variables in CSS
hallucinated_features.reason: The index.css file includes extensive dark mode color definitions (.dark class), but the BuildRequest makes no mention of dark mode support or theming requirements.
